creator: stb@lassitu.de
text:
Created attachment 228561
patch to update the port to 1.15.4

Update port to 1.15.4

This release contains sixteen bugfixes and two enhancements.

Note: We remind users that a bug was discovered with gitea dump in 1.14.3–1.14.6 and 1.15.0. Database dumps from these versions cause broken fields in the repo_unit and login_source tables causing the issue identified in #16961. Users on 1.14.x must upgrade to 1.14.7 before running gitea dump. See the release notes for more information.


Release notes:
https://blog.gitea.io/2021/10/gitea-1.15.4-is-released/
